effectText: [DON!! x1] All of your Characters gain +1 cost. [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When 2 or more DON!! cards on your field are returned to your DON!! deck, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active, and add up to 1 additional DON!! card and rest it.

effects.description: When 2 or more DON!! cards on your field are returned to your DON!! deck
